title: selaginella nubigena
intro: Selaginella nubigena, also known as the cloud moss or nubigena spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Selaginella nubigena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. It can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
